title: Twist Bioscience (TWST) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
text: Twist Bioscience reported a quarterly loss of $0.53 per share, beating analyst expectations of a $0.62 loss. This represented a 14.52% earnings surprise compared to consensus estimates. The company's loss improved significantly from $0.75 per share in the prior year. The biotech firm generated quarterly revenues of $88.71 million for the period ending December 2024, exceeding consensus projections by 2.04%. Year-over-year, this reflects growth from $71.5 million in revenues. According to analysts, the sustainability of the stock's immediate price movement based on the recently-released numbers and future earnings expectations will mostly depend on management's commentary on the earnings call. The stock has gained approximately 12.7% since the start of 2025, outpacing the S&P 500's 2.7% gain. Zacks assigned the company a Hold rating, suggesting near-term performance aligned with market expectations. Current consensus estimates project a loss of $0.60 per share for the upcoming quarter.
